title: Uncanny Valley as Depth Classification Failure

analysis.object: T578: Uncanny Valley as Depth Classification Failure depth analysis

human_face_classified.description: Real human face: classified at one EML depth by brain
human_face_classified.reason: Human face recognition is EML-3: oscillatory neural pattern matching

cartoon_classified.description: Cartoon face: classified at different EML depth; no discomfort
cartoon_classified.reason: Cartoon is EML-0: symbolic, discrete; brain classifies cleanly

between_depths.description: Almost-human sits BETWEEN depths; T110 says fractional depth is impossible
between_depths.reason: Uncanny valley is depth classification failure: brain cannot assign integer depth

discomfort_is_impossibility.description: The discomfort IS the impossibility of fractional EML depth
discomfort_is_impossibility.reason: Uncanny valley is the subjective experience of EML-4 nonexistence

analysis.theorem: T578: Uncanny Valley as Depth Classification Failure (S857).

key_theorem: T578: Uncanny Valley as Depth Classification Failure (S857).
